race.comment: DE ASCOT (3) gets the nod. He showed speed on debut at Geelong over 1425m and ran a great race, only going down by a nose. By D'Argento, up to 1600m should suit much better and he's expected to take a strong step forward from an ideal gate. JUSTIBELLA (14) has been going well this time in, stepping up to 1400m here last time and running well when second, beaten a head. Up to 1600m should suit nicely now and she maps for a lovely run. WAZZA (10) is a gelding by Ghaiyyath on debut for the Mitch Freedman yard. He's jumped out well enough and the mile should be an ideal trip first time out. DURHAM (4) continues to race well without breaking through and looks another lively each-way hope. BOSS BOY (2) made nice improvement second up and can take another step here.
